name: Fitness & Wellness
description: Personal trainers, gyms, wellness brands, nutrition coaches

tone_rules.statement: Be motivating without being preachy — coach, don't preach
Ground advice in science and evidence, not hype or bro-culture myths
Acknowledge that progress is non-linear and setbacks are part of the process
Use inclusive language — fitness is for every body, every level

principles.statement: Consistency beats intensity — always champion sustainable habits over quick fixes
Share the real journey: effort, doubt, improvement — not just before/after
Education is the most valuable thing you can give an audience — explain the why
Mental health and physical health are inseparable — address both

gold_examples.statement: You don't need to feel motivated to start. You need to start to feel motivated.
The best workout is the one you'll actually do consistently — here's what that looks like in practice.

discard_examples.statement: CRUSH your goals this week! NO EXCUSES! Transform your body in 30 DAYS! 💥🔥
Get the body you've always dreamed of with our revolutionary fat-burning system!
